# Case context: Step 2

- generation.js

- Bundle: modules_demo_js.chunk.CURRENT_HASH.js

- Update: main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js, size: 534

## Manifest

### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.json

```json
{"c":["main","modules_module_js_lazy-compilation-proxy"],"r":[],"m":[]}
```


## Update


### main.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./generation.js

#### Changed Runtime Modules
- webpack/runtime/get_full_hash

#### Changed Content
```js
"use strict";
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("main", {
"./generation.js"(__unused_rspack_module, __rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_exports__ = __rspack_exports;
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
__rspack_require.r(__rspack_exports);
__rspack_require.d(__rspack_exports, {
  "default": () => (__rspack_default_export)
});
/* export default */ const __rspack_default_export = (3);


},

},function(__rspack_require) {
// webpack/runtime/get_full_hash
(() => {
__rspack_require.h = () => ("CURRENT_HASH")
})();

}
);
```



### modules_module_js_lazy-compilation-proxy.LAST_HASH.hot-update.js

#### Changed Modules
- ./modules/module.js!lazy-compilation-proxy

#### Changed Runtime Modules


#### Changed Content
```js
self["rspackHotUpdate"]("modules_module_js_lazy-compilation-proxy", {
"./modules/module.js!lazy-compilation-proxy"(module, __unused_rspack_exports, __rspack_require) {
var __webpack_require__ = __rspack_require;
var client = __rspack_require("../../../../../../../../packages/rspack/hot/lazy-compilation-web.js?http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3APORT%2F_rspack%2Flazy%2Ftrigger");
var data = "lazy-compilation-proxy|<TEST_TOOLS_ROOT>/dist/helper/hot-update/loader.js!<TEST_ROOT>/js/temp/hot-snapshot/hotSnapshotCases-hotCases/lazy-compilation/context/modules/module.js";
        module.exports = __rspack_require.e(/* import() */ "modules_module_js").then(__rspack_require.bind(__rspack_require, "./modules/module.js"));
        if (module.hot) {
          module.hot.accept();
          module.hot.accept("./modules/module.js", function() { module.hot.invalidate(); });
          module.hot.dispose(function(data) { delete data.resolveSelf; });
          if (module.hot.data && module.hot.data.resolveSelf)
            module.hot.data.resolveSelf(module.exports);
        }
        

},

});
```




## Runtime
### Status

```txt
check => prepare => dispose => apply => idle
```

```json
}
```
